creator: Timothy.Michael.Vanderhoek@X3000
text:
There is no port of slnr.

Slnr is a simple newsreader for SOUP mail/news packets.

I actually sent a message about this port to ports@freebsd.org, but
I suspect that one may have been one of the ports that slipped-through
before the method of submitting ports was changed...  If not, then
it doesn't hurt because the port was changed a tiny bit (see section
entitled "Fix:".

Fix: 

See the file on ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming called
slnr-port2.tar.gz.

Note that this replaces the file named slnr-port.tar.gz which had left
a few small slnr bugs unfixed (I'd used the program for a week before 
submitting, but a couple small ones slipped past).
How-To-Repeat: 
Type pkg_add slnr-2.13.tgz and nothing will happen.
